creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 189329
update 1.23.4 -> 1.23.6

Hi, I send a patch to update recoll from 1.23.4 to 1.23.6 version.

Minor changes have been introduced, some of them suggested by portlint:

* SHEBANG_FILES has been expanded to more python filters
* configure no longer need --enable-pic
* Substituted spaces by tabs
* Added install-strip

Release notes:

http://www.lesbonscomptes.com/recoll/release-1.23.html


Some basic test has been performed, with no apparent issue.


Regards
